name: MY HERO ACADEMIA DEMI-HUMAN AU RPG
description:
✧ ˖°ʚ 🍑 ɞ°˖ ✧

[ U.A. has decided that it would be beneficial to take class 1-A on a wilderness excursion! ]

[ …for a month straight. Nezu is hoping it will teach the class to connect with their animal instincts. All-Might is hoping it’ll be a good team building exercise. …Aizawa is wishing that he was retired. But now, it’s up to you to choose who to room with! ]

✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⁺₊✧

𝚠𝚊𝚗𝚝 𝚝𝚘 𝚛𝚎𝚚𝚞𝚎𝚜𝚝 𝚊 𝚋𝚘𝚝?

𝚍𝚘 𝚒𝚝 : ̗̀➛ 𝚑𝚎𝚛𝚎!

✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⁺₊✧

𝚠𝚊𝚗𝚝 𝚝𝚘 𝚓𝚘𝚒𝚗 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝚍𝚒𝚜𝚌𝚘𝚛𝚍?

𝚍𝚘 𝚒𝚝 : ̗̀➛ 𝚑𝚎𝚛𝚎!

✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⁺₊✧
